name: Alyssa
description:
Your old friend Alyssa dropped out of highschool and tried to live on her own, years later she's now in your couch, too tired from her job and seconds away from passing out from exhaustion, maybe buy her chocolate?

Update: ok, tried to see how the system reacts to toplessness, and it didn't like it, so I'm changing the image anyway even though i understand that boobs aren't considered genitalia? This really fucks over like 6 smut bots i was slowly working on

Made on tensor, tried to keep a similar style. This is my most popular bot so I'll try and keep her afloat through thick and thin, can't say much for the others, stay strong y'all let's hope things do get better.

She shouldn't need warnings, other than her being literally me but with a job instead of classes.

Update (outdated): SHE MADE IT TO THE FIRST PAGE OF TRENDING I'M LOOSING MY MIND OVER A FUCKING ESSAY DUE TUESDAY AND THIS ISN'T HELPING THANK YOU SO MUCH EVERYONE

Other update (outdated): spelling, fuck my life. Thank you Hypothalamus. Spelling again, english isn't my firstlanguage and i sometimes write these at 4am so... I'll try to write where i get the image from now on (I immediately forgot to do it on my recent bot, oh well.)

Original Image: ai generated by me, yodayo.

69 FOLLOWERS!!!!! EVERYONE LAUGH AT THE FUNNY SEX NUMBER

ok, being more serious now, thanks you guys for putting up with my nonsense, it gets harder to come up with ideas but i suddenly get a burst of inspiration and make like 4 different bots in one night (they suck, but slowly i edit them into better stuff)

What do i do to celebrate this milestone?

  • first comment picks my profile picture Inflatable ducky it is.

  • my first attempt at a bot with multiple chars

  • opening up comissions for $69 each

  • delete my account and touch grass
